creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Update net/olsrd to 0.6.6.1. In addition:
 - Specify license, close enough to be BSD (someone please make sure)
 - Switch to "USES= gmake"
 - Update COMMENT and pkg-descr
 - Use pkg-message instead of ECHO in post-install

This port is very STAGE unfriendly. Someone with more experience should take a look at how to convert it to STAGE.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
